allow: Bash(python3 --version 2>&1 && which uvx 2>/dev/null && uvx --version 2>/dev/null && which claude 2>/dev/null)
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT event_type, session_id, substr\(data,1,200\) FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE '%seed%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "PRAGMA table_info\(events\)" && sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT event_type, substr\(data,1,300\) FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE '%seed%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT event_type, aggregate_id, substr\(payload,1,300\) FROM events WHERE event_type LIKE '%seed%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5")

Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT DISTINCT event_type FROM events ORDER BY event_type" && sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT aggregate_id, event_type, substr\(payload,1,200\) FROM events ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 10")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT aggregate_id, event_type, substr\(payload,1,500\) FROM events WHERE aggregate_id LIKE 'seed%' ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 5")
Bash(sqlite3 ~/.ouroboros/ouroboros.db "SELECT aggregate_id, event_type, substr\(payload,1,500\) FROM events WHERE payload LIKE '%seed_c74c97a53eca%' LIMIT 5")
